Tip of the day
Skill levels exceeding an activity's main skill requirement gives +1.25% extra Work efficiency for what you're doing, up to 20 levels.

Tarsilium saw
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Tools
Value: 273
Keywords: Carpentry tool
Saw
Search
Keyword: 		Carpentry

Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

The dark obsidian-like teeth of the saw are ready to bite!

The Tarsilium saw item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • At least Carpentry lvl. 42.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

+6% Work efficiency While doing Carpentry.
+11% Chest finding While doing Carpentry.
+2% Double rewards While doing Carpentry.
+1% No materials consumed While doing Carpentry.

+10% Work efficiency While doing Carpentry.
+12% Chest finding While doing Carpentry.
+2.5% Double rewards While doing Carpentry.
+1.5% No materials consumed While doing Carpentry.

+14% Work efficiency While doing Carpentry.
+13% Chest finding While doing Carpentry.
+3% Double rewards While doing Carpentry.
+2% No materials consumed While doing Carpentry.

+18% Work efficiency While doing Carpentry.
+14% Chest finding While doing Carpentry.
+3.5% Double rewards While doing Carpentry.
+2.5% No materials consumed While doing Carpentry.

+22% Work efficiency While doing Carpentry.
+15% Chest finding While doing Carpentry.
+4% Double rewards While doing Carpentry.
+3% No materials consumed While doing Carpentry.

+26% Work efficiency While doing Carpentry.
+16% Chest finding While doing Carpentry.
+5% Double rewards While doing Carpentry.
+4% No materials consumed While doing Carpentry.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Craft a tarsilium saw

You suffer several cuts from the exceptionally sharp tarsilium saw blade when attaching it back to the wooden base.

Improve a saw with the advancement of tarsilium metal.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft a tarsilium saw Crafting lvl. 42 Needs Basic Workshop service or better. 1x Simple saw
2x Tarsilium bar		 1x Tarsilium saw

Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
Work Efficiency 		Max
XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.
Craft a tarsilium saw 142 182 0.780 91 steps 200% 1.560 55,054 steps

Rate 		W.E.A.R.
